title: bulbostylis scabricaulis
intro: Bulbostylis scabricaulis, also known as the rough-stemmed club-rush, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bulbostylis scabricaulis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. The herbal preparations of Bulbostylis scabricaulis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots, stems, and leaves in hot water or a solvent.
